titleStmt.title: SII 28.262: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 262. (A.R. No. 416 of 1913.)

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine, south wall.

Records an order (from the king ?), taking note of the receipt (purchased ?) of the village Ilattipāḍi by the tāṉattār of the temple of Tirukkāmīśvam uḍaiyaṉāyaṉār, the uḍaiyār of Āṟakaḷūr in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam from Malaiyuṉuḍai-chchempai and making that village tax-free (iṟai-ili) in favour of that God (i.e.) entitling the God to enjoy not only the wet and dry land and ēndal-paṟṟu of the village but also to receive and utilise (the proceeds of) the income from all taxes (āyaṅgaḷ) including the tax in gold (poṉ-vāri) as also internal levies payable to nāḍu (nāṭṭūvīṉiyōgam). The purpose of the grant was to maintain the (daily) worship, to finance the conduct of festival for that god and also to carry out periodical repairs etc. (tiruppaṇi). (See No. 263 below).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅ
kacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉañcāvatu Āṟṟūr kū
ṟṟattu Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tirukkāmicuramuṭaiya nā
yaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tāṅkaḷ
malaiyaṉuṭaiyac cempai pakkal koṇṭuṭaiya Ila
ttipāṭi nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa naṉcey puṉce
y Ental paṟṟu Uṭpaṭa poṉvari Uḷḷiṭṭa Aṉaittāya
ṅkaḷum nāṭṭu viṉiyokamum Uṭpaṭa Iṉṉā[*]yaṉārkku Iṟaiyiliyā
kap pūcaikkum tiruṉāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalā
ka tantom Ivai vāṇakovaraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai villavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 28.262 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
